title: 'Oholiybah #0172
definition:
Aholibah = "woman of the tent" or "the tent is in her"

 1) (metaph) Jerusalem as adulterous wife of Jehovah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Aholibah = "woman of the tent" or "the tent is in her"

 1) (metaph) Jerusalem as adulterous wife of Jehovah

    NASB:  tent in her, a symbolic name for Jer.
